# services.kismet

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.kismet`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.kismet.dataDir` | `absolute path` | The Kismet data directory. |
| `services.kismet.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable kismet. |
| `services.kismet.extraConfig` | `string` | Literal Kismet config lines appended to the site config. Note that `services.kismet.settings` allows you to define all options here using Nix attribute sets. |
| `services.kismet.group` | `string` | The group to run Kismet as. |
| `services.kismet.httpd.address` | `string` | The address to listen on. Note that this cannot be a hostname or Kismet will not start. |
| `services.kismet.httpd.enable` | `boolean` | True to enable the HTTP server. |
| `services.kismet.httpd.port` | `16 bit unsigned integer; between 0 and 65535 (both inclusive)` | The port to listen on. |
| `services.kismet.logTypes` | `list of string` | The log types. |
| `services.kismet.package` | `package` | The kismet package to use. |
| `services.kismet.serverDescription` | `string` | The description of the server. |
| `services.kismet.serverName` | `string` | The name of the server. |
| `services.kismet.settings` | `Kismet config stanza` | Options for Kismet. See: https://www.kismetwireless.net/docs/readme/configuring/configfiles/ |
| `services.kismet.user` | `string` | The user to run Kismet as. |
